title: Junior Business Development Manager at InfraMantra

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at InfraMantra
jsonLd.description:
InfraMantra, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About InfraMantra:
InfraMantra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with InfraMantra!
